name: Incorrect Access of Indexable Resource ('Range Error')
description: The product does not properly restrict index or pointer operations within the boundaries of an indexable resource (array, buffer, string), potentially allowing out-of-bounds reads or writes that corrupt memory or leak data.
detection_pattern: INGRESS or TRANSFORM node provides an index or pointer value that is used to access a STORAGE[indexable_resource] (array, buffer, string) without a CONTROL[bounds_check] node that validates the index is within the valid range [0, length) before the access operation
